title: Lazur's Ores
description: This texture pack modifies the textures of the ores to give a new look, a new feel, add some vines to it, and make the Nether Quartz Ore appear big.
body:
![LazurMC Banner of Header Title 'About The Texture Pack'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24e4fb497abc0976359c6c5c1aebbe565554b5a4_0.webp)

This is a texture pack created by LazurMC that modifies the textures of the ores and deepslate ores. In this context, the ores include the Coal Ore, the Iron Ore, the Copper Ore, the Lapis Lazuli Ore, the Redstone Ore, the Emerald Ore, the Diamond Ore, the Nether Quartz Ore, and the Nether Gold Ore, and the deepslate ores include all the mentioned ores' deepslate versions. This texture pack adds veins to the ore, along with adding a fresh new look to the ores, and making the Nether Quartz Ore's mineral much bigger (I have no idea why I did that). It also adds a few splash texts that give some fun bits of information about the texture pack. If you want to know more about how this texture pack was made or other details, head over to our official blog [here](https://lazurmc.blogspot.com/) and search for the relevant post. For instructions on how to use this texture pack, head over to our next section. Hope you enjoy using this texture pack! Please note, by using, downloading, and playing this mod, you agree to GluwdeGamer Code of Conduct ([94241GG](https://gluwdegamer.wixsite.com/gluwdegamer/legal-info)), LazurMC Copyright Notice ([78900LRMC](https://gluwdegamer.wixsite.com/lazurmc/legal-info)), and other applicable legal rules.

**You may download this from our [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/user/LazurMC), our [DeviantArt page](https://www.deviantart.com/lazurmc), or our [PlanetMinecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lazurmc/).**

**Check out other resource packs from our Lazur's Ores Texture Pack: [Lazur's Ores [Darq]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lazurs-ores-darq) | [Lazur's Ores [Lite]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lazurs-ores-lite)**

**View the official trailer of the Lazur's Ores texture pack below which is also available on YouTube:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n1bDvLnbnAY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**By the way, don't forget to subscribe to the LazurMC channel! Access the channel [here](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQUKjgj0lZPMWdb1zFAQC1g).**


![LazurMC Banner of Header Title 'How To Use This Texture Pack'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a49932d8ff29e4c4bd35cc1dd2c04113b82ab3dc_0.webp)

First of all, shoutout to the [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) development team for making the creation of this texture pack possible. Now, since this texture pack was created in MCreator 2025.3, the texture pack may appear incompatible since the latest version is 1.21.11 and the texture pack version is 1.21.8. But, don't worry, its actually not incompatible, since the versions are not the same, the game is by default supposed to inform you, but since this modifies the ores and adds a few texts, it would not be a problem. We tried to modify the meta data of the pack, but error messages might appear. Follow the steps below to use this texture pack.

1. Install The Texture Pack: Head to one of the linked pages above, look for the corresponding texture pack, and download it. Make sure you don't extract the files from this ZIP file or make further modifications to this ZIP file except changing the name.
2. Locate The 'Resource Packs' Folder: Next, head to where the '.minecraft' folder is present. Open it, and locate the 'resourcepacks' folder. Your path may be this: "C:\Users\[Your Username]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks". If you can't find one, don't worry! Just create a new folder and name it 'resourcepacks'.
3. Move The ZIP File To The Folder: Then, move the ZIP file to the 'resourcepacks' folder from your Downloads folder (or wherever you have downloaded). Ensure the folder name 'resourcepacks' is correct and that you have not extracted the ZIP file.
4. Enjoy Using Our Texture Pack: After you have completed these 3 steps, open your launcher, launch the game, and ensure that the texture pack is within the 'active resource packs' list. If not, move the texture pack to the list, and agree to the risk shown by the game saying that this texture pack is incompatible. After this, enjoy our special texture pack that modifies the ores and give it a new look. If you encounter any issues or bugs, go through all previous 3 steps, or report the bug by contacting us or commenting. Hope you enjoy the texture pack! :)

![LazurMC Banner of Header Title 'Frequently Asked Questions [FAQs]'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbd612852d41f1913d7a10a7c46951894bfcc799_0.webp)

1. Am I free to distribute this texture pack? What is this texture pack licensed as? Can I use it in my videos, Shorts, etc.?
Answer: No, this texture pack is originally not allowed for distribution by unauthorized 3rd parties unless otherwise permitted by LazurMC, GluwdeGamer or by applicable law. This texture pack is licensed as Proprietary License/All Rights Reserved (ARR) License. Yes, you can use it in your videos, Shorts, etc., provided that you include attribution in the appropriate area in your description.

2. Is there any specific attribution I have to include when using in my videos?
Answer: Yes, please copy this attribution so as to include this texture pack in your videos (do copy the links and place them appropriately, do not exclude these links): Texture Pack Originally By LazurMC | [Visit The Website](https://gluwdegamer.wixsite.com/lazurmc) | [Visit The YT Channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQUKjgj0lZPMWdb1zFAQC1g) | © 2026 [LazurMC](https://gluwdegamer.wixsite.com/lazurmc) and [GluwdeGamer](https://gluwdegamer.wixsite.com/gluwdegamer). All Rights Reserved.

3. Can I suggest something to be added?
Answer: Absolutely! Feel free to leave your suggestions in the comments, on our social media platforms, or on our email linked below.

**If you have any other questions or complaints, please leave them in the comments, or on our email linked below.**
